nodes.label: Graceful Degradation (Storage Optional)
nodes.rationale: AppState.storage is Option<SharedStorage>; app runs in real-time-only mode if DuckDB init fails rather than crashing

nodes.label: Zero-Copy Buffer Pattern
nodes.rationale: Arrow IPC used for columnar position batches sent from Rust to TypeScript frontend without JSON serialization overhead

nodes.label: Feature Flag: CLI vs Desktop
nodes.rationale: CLI crate uses cfg_attr(feature=cli, derive(Parser)) to gate clap dependency; desktop crate uses default-features=false to exclude it

nodes.label: Zero-Loss DB Rotation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Roll to a new DuckDB file atomically while preserving all in-flight messages; avoids data loss at rotation boundary

nodes.label: Pluggable Backend Pattern
nodes.rationale: MessageForwarder trait enables swappable Pulsar/File/Noop backends; gates Pulsar dependency behind feature flag to keep edge builds lightweight
